fields.label: Service Account Key (JSON)
fields.helpText: Full JSON key file content from GCP Console -> IAM -> Service Accounts -> Keys

fields.label: Project ID
fields.helpText: GCP project ID (not project name). Found in the project selector or dashboard.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates GCP credentials by listing project metadata

metadata.summary: Google Cloud Platform access for compute, storage, billing, and other GCP services.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to the GCP Console (console.cloud.google.com).
2. Navigate to IAM & Admin -> Service Accounts.
3. Click 'Create Service Account' and give it a descriptive name.
4. Grant it the roles needed for your use case (e.g., Billing Viewer for cost monitoring).
5. Go to the Keys tab and click 'Add Key' -> 'Create new key' -> JSON.
6. Copy the entire JSON content and paste it here.
7. Note your Project ID from the project selector at the top of the console.
